title: CONTACT | Rosie Duffield MP
headings: h3: MP for Canterbury, Whitstable and the Villages
text_excerpt: --> CONTACT | Rosie Duffield MP top of page Rosie Duffield MP for Canterbury, Whitstable and the Villages HOME ABOUT ROSIE PRIORITIES Defending our Green Spaces A Brighter Future for Our Young Building a Fairer Economy Protecting our Waterways Strengthening our NHS A Stronger Relationship with Europe CONSTITUENCY NEWS SEND Survey - April 2026 Birth Trauma Inquiry CONTACT More Use tab to navigate through the menu items. Contacting Rosie As your local MP, Rosie can help and advise residents with various issues, such as education, environmental issues, antisocial behaviour, health and social services, highways, transport, housing, tax and national insurance, benefits, pensions and immigration. You can contact Rosie using the details below. ​ ​ By contrast, your Councillors can help constituents on various other issues, such as council tax, bin collections, housing issues, social services, schools, roads, and payments.​ ​ You can find your Canterbury City Councillor here , and your Kent County Councillor here . STAY IN TOUCH! Sign up for Rosie's Newsletter SUBSCRIBE Thanks for submitting! Contact Rosie's Team Address House of Commons, London, SW1A 0AA Email enquiries@rosieduffieldmp.co.uk Keeping you posted Don't forget to stay in touch by signing up for Rosie's Newsletter email using the form above, and by following Rosie on social media at the accounts below.
